shrink-0"})]}),x&&e.jsxs(e.Fragment,{children:[e.jsx("div",{className:"fixed inset-0 z-40",onClick:()=>i(!1)}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"absolute left-0 right-0 mt-1.5 bg-white border border-slate-200 font-semibold text-slate-700",onClick:t=>t.stopPropagation()}),n&&e.jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:t=>{t.stopPropagation(),b("")},className:"absolute right-2.5 top-2 text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-650 font-bold",children:"×"})]}),e.jsx("div",{className:"overflow-y-auto divide-y divide-slate-100 max-h-52 pr-1",children:(()=>{const t.length===0?e.jsx("div",{className:"py-4 text-center text-slate-400 text-[11px]",children:s==="ar"?"لا يوجد منتجات مطابقة للبحث":"No matching products found"}):t.map(a=>{const l=a.id===h;return $",a.costPrice.toFixed(2)]})]})]},a.id)})})()})]})]})]})]}),e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-650 mb-1",children:s==="ar"?"المورد المعتمد للشراء font-bold"})]}),e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-650 mb-1",children:s==="ar"?"سعر شراء الوحدة ($)":"Unit Cost Price e.jsxs("tr",{className:"hover:bg-indigo-50/25 transition cursor-pointer",onClick:()=>F(t),title:s==="ar"?"اضغط لعرض التفاصيل وتصديرها":"Click to view full purchase details",children:[e.jsx("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 font-bold text-slate-800",children:a?a.name:"Unknown Product"}),e.jsx("td",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:l?l.name:"Direct Stock Addition"}),e.jsxs("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 font-mono text-emerald-600 font-bold",children:["+",t.quantity," pcs"]}),e.jsxs("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 Date(t.date).toLocaleDateString()})]},t.id)})})]})})]})]})}const O=R.memo(T);export{O as default};
